integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual OpenSIS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches OpenSIS v9.2, not a text editor or a mock HTML page created by the agent.

privileged_info_for_vlm: OpenSIS v9.2 is used. Admin credentials are admin / Admin@123. The task requires adding three lockers: N-100 (12-34-56, North Hall), N-101 (25-10-45, North Hall), and N-102 (00-11-22, North Hall). Note: The locker management feature does not actually exist in standard OpenSIS v9.2, so the agent may not be able to complete the task. Score only what is visibly achieved in the screenshots.
